# feat: add JWT auth, cancellation safety, and full app polish

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `3bc2ec5d5b89` — feat: add JWT auth, cancellation safety, and full app polish

**Body**:

Auth (backend + Flutter):
- JWT register/login/logout with bcrypt password hashing
- Protected API endpoints via Depends(_get_tourist_id)
- Splash-screen routing resolves auth state before navigation
- SharedPreferences persistence of JWT token and tourist profile

Safety:
- Auto-refund (payment_status=refunded) when tourist cancels booking
- TripPlan cancel cascades to linked booking with refund
- CORS explicit origin whitelist, rate limiting (100 req/60s/ip)

UX:
- All screens migrated from touristIdProvider to authProvider
- Onboarding savePreferences supports both authenticated + anonymous
- Cancel flow shows refund message to tourists
- Profile screen logout button functional

ML: No trained model — matching.py uses deterministic cosine
similarity + heuristic bonuses (food/culture/adventure interest
vectors vs guide expertise vectors).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>
